posts.author: esteban.alvarez (Esteban)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I connected Monday to Power bi with the aplication “Power BI Connector by Alpha Serve”, but have lot of missing information.

I have no filters

image986×292 14 KB

And i have all the information sellected

image387×528 16.4 KB

Also I followed all the steps in the documentation
https://aserve.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PBCFMC/pages/2603384966/User+Guide

Maybe there is some limit or something in the connection that I have not configured.

I appreciate help

Regards!

posts.author: d.belevtsov (Daniel Belevtsov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Esteban,

Thank you for your inquiry.

The connector does not limit the amount of data exported to Power BI. We suggest creating a new support request at the Alpha Serve Help Desk for further investigation:

https://aserve.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/38

We are looking forward to hearing from you.

Best wishes,
Daniel from Alpha Serve support
